title: BigBearai Holdings (BBAI) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: TipRanks provides detailed analyst forecasts and price targets for BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI). The platform tracks analyst ratings and price targets with the consensus showing moderate bullish sentiment. The average price target of $5.50 represents approximately 30% upside from recent trading levels around $4.20. HC Wainwright analyst Scott Buck rates BBAI as Buy with a $6.00 price target. Cantor Fitzgerald analyst Jonathan Ruykhaver rates the stock as Hold with a more conservative price target. Other analysts maintain neutral positions given execution uncertainties. The forecast models highlight key catalysts: Q1 backlog jump to $281.9 million, Ask Sage margin contribution, and Pentagon AI spending tailwinds. Risk factors include continued cash burn, path to profitability uncertainty, securities litigation, and execution challenges on backlog conversion. TipRanks Smart Score analysis provides additional technical and fundamental indicators to help investors evaluate BBAI investment thesis. The platform tracks insider trading activity, showing 18 insider sales with zero purchases over the past year.
